title: Set up project foundation: config, types, and store
description: Create package.json, TypeScript config, Tailwind config, core types (src/lib/types.ts), and the in-memory data store (src/lib/store.ts). The store must export typed Maps for each entity and a seed function.
notes: All other tasks depend on types.ts — get the interfaces right here. Store.ts must export Maps: users, sessions, clients, invoices, lineItems, payments, taxRates, statusHistory, emailLogs, plans, subscriptions. Seed.ts should insert demo data (demo@example.com user, plans, 3 clients, tax rates, 5 invoices).

title: Implement authentication system with cookie-based sessions
description: Create auth.ts with functions for user registration, login (password plaintext), logout, session validation. Implement API routes for register, login, logout, and me. Build login and register pages with forms.
notes: Passwords stored as plaintext per PRD. Sessions: Map<token, userId>. HttpOnly cookie named 'sid'. Login page redirects to dashboard on success. Register creates a user with 'pro' subscription for demo.

title: Build client management (API + UI)
description: Implement GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/clients endpoints with auth and ownership checks. Build clients list page with table, add client form inline, and delete/archive logic with guard.
notes: DELETE must check for active (non-paid) invoices and return 409 with invoice_ids if present. force_archive=true soft-deletes. ClientForm used in invoice creation later. UI must show archived state.

title: Implement tax rates API and core calculation utilities
description: Build tax rates CRUD endpoints with default rate handling. Create calculations.ts for server-side financial math (subtotal, discount, tax, total). Implement invoice-number.ts for per-user auto-increment.
notes: Calculations must use integer cents only. Discount can be flat (cents) or percent (basis points). Invoice number format: INV-0001 per user. DELETE tax rate must check for unpaid invoice references.

title: Build invoice CRUD API (draft creation and editing)
description: Implement POST /api/invoices (create draft), GET /api/invoices (list with filtering/pagination), GET/PATCH /api/invoices/[id] endpoints. Include auth, ownership, and status guards (409 if paid).
notes: POST must validate at least 1 line item, calculate totals server-side. PATCH must block line item changes if status is sent/viewed/overdue. Filtering by status, client_id, date_range. Pagination with page_size=50.

title: Implement invoice send pipeline with simulated PDF and email
description: Build POST /api/invoices/[id]/send endpoint that transitions status, generates simulated PDF (sets pdf_url), creates EmailLog entry, and signs token. Create token.ts for HMAC-like signing and pdf.ts for HTML generation.
notes: Critical path: simulates async pipeline synchronously. PDF generation returns HTML string; set pdf_url to '/api/invoices/:id/pdf' (not implemented). Token signing uses base64url(invoiceId:userId:secret). EmailLog with fake provider_message_id.

title: Build payment tracking and public invoice view
description: Implement PATCH /api/invoices/[id]/mark-paid (creates Payment, transitions to paid). Build GET /api/invoices/view/[token] for public access (no auth) that sets status to viewed and returns invoice data.
notes: Mark-paid must be idempotent (409 if already paid). Public view validates token, transitions sent→viewed idempotently, creates statusHistory. Return 404 on invalid token (do not reveal existence).

title: Build dashboard API and page with lazy overdue updates
description: Implement GET /api/dashboard/summary that calculates outstanding total, paid this month, overdue count. Include lazy overdue status transition (update any sent/viewed invoices past due_date). Build dashboard page with summary cards.
notes: Dashboard API must trigger overdue updates on each call (no cron). Calculations in user's default currency. UI shows three summary cards. Seed data should produce ~$8,360 outstanding, $1,100 paid, 1 overdue.

title: Build invoice UI components (form, table, badges)
description: Create InvoiceForm for editing line items, discount, tax, client selection. Build InvoiceTable for listing invoices with status filtering. Create StatusBadge component for draft/sent/viewed/paid/overdue. Create Nav component.
notes: InvoiceForm must allow inline client creation. Line items table with qty, unit_price (cents), description. Calculations previewed but not trusted — server recalculates on save. Nav shows login/logout based on auth.

title: Build invoice list and detail pages
description: Create invoices list page (/invoices) with table, filters, and pagination. Build invoice detail page (/invoices/[id]) showing full invoice, line items, and actions (send, mark-paid). Create edit page (/invoices/[id]/edit) for drafts.
notes: Detail page conditionally shows send button (draft), mark-paid (sent/viewed/overdue). Edit page only accessible for draft invoices. Use server components to fetch data directly from store.

title: Build new invoice page and public view page
description: Create new invoice page (/invoices/new) with InvoiceForm. Build public view page (/view/[token]) that displays invoice as read-only HTML (mirroring PDF). Implement main layout with Nav.
notes: Public view page must not show edit actions. Layout includes Nav and auth state. New invoice page creates draft on submit, redirects to edit page.

title: Final integration: home page and plan limit enforcement
description: Create home page (/) that redirects to dashboard if logged in, else shows marketing. Add plan limit checks in client/invoice creation APIs (free: 5 clients, 10 invoices/month). Ensure all navigation works.
notes: Home page simple. Plan limits: check in POST /clients and POST /invoices. Seed user has pro plan (unlimited). All demo flows should work end-to-end.
